inputs.label: Total Property Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total acquisition cost of the property including land and improvements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total acquisition cost of the property including land and improvements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arazi ve iyileştirmeler dahil mülkün toplam edinim maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Anschaffungskosten des Grundstücks einschließlich Land und Verbesserungen.

inputs.label: Land Value Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total cost allocated to land (non-depreciable).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total cost allocated to land (non-depreciable).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam maliyetin araziye ayrılan yüzdesi (amortismana tabi değildir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gesamtkosten, der auf das Land entfällt (nicht abschreibbar).

inputs.label: Building Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allocated to building structure (depreciable over 39 years typically).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage allocated to building structure (depreciable over 39 years typically).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bina yapısına ayrılan yüzde (genellikle 39 yılda amortismana tabidir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf die Gebäudestruktur entfällt (typischerweise über 39 Jahre abschreibbar).

inputs.label: Personal Property Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allocated to 5- or 7-year property like equipment, furniture.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage allocated to 5- or 7-year property like equipment, furniture.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipman, mobilya gibi 5 veya 7 yıllık mülke ayrılan yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf 5- oder 7-jähriges Eigentum wie Ausrüstung, Möbel entfällt.

inputs.label: Land Improvements Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allocated to land improvements (depreciable over 15 years).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage allocated to land improvements (depreciable over 15 years).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arazi iyileştirmelerine ayrılan yüzde (15 yılda amortismana tabidir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf Grundstücksverbesserungen entfällt (über 15 Jahre abschreibbar).

inputs.label: Building Depreciation Life
inputs.businessContext: IRS recovery period for non-residential real property (39 years).

businessContext_i18n.en: IRS recovery period for non-residential real property (39 years).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konut dışı gayrimenkul için IRS geri kazanım süresi (39 yıl).

inputs.label: Personal Property Life
inputs.businessContext: Recovery period for personal property (5 or 7 years).

businessContext_i18n.en: Recovery period for personal property (5 or 7 years).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişisel mülk için geri kazanım süresi (5 veya 7 yıl).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wiederherstellungszeitraum für persönliches Eigentum (5 oder 7 Jahre).

inputs.label: Land Improvements Life
inputs.businessContext: Recovery period for land improvements (15 years).

businessContext_i18n.en: Recovery period for land improvements (15 years).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arazi iyileştirmeleri için geri kazanım süresi (15 yıl).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
